items.title: Improve App Connectivity
items.rationale: 79% of reviews mention app connectivity issues, with 43% being positive about the app when it works.

items.title: Enhance Setup Experience
items.rationale: 75% of reviews mention setup issues, with 33% being positive about the setup process when it works.

items.title: Address Battery Life Concerns
items.rationale: 6% of reviews mention battery life issues, with 1% being positive about battery life.

items.title: Improve Customer Service
items.rationale: 31% of reviews mention poor customer service, with only 3% being positive about the service.

items.title: Optimize Accuracy Features
items.rationale: 41% of reviews mention accuracy issues, with 13% being positive about the accuracy features.
